title: perilla frutescens var. crispa
intro: Perilla frutescens var. crispa, also known as kkaennip or seson, is a variety of the perilla plant that is native to East Asia, characterized by its curly leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of perilla frutescens var. crispa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Perilla frutescens var. crispa can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or powder for consumption, and is also used in traditional Korean and Chinese medicine.
